svg.aria-label: SuperCoach VIA — 130 years of AFL data, 13,329 player files, AI-powered disposal predictions reviewed by a seven-agent council. 2026 season R1–R13: MAE 4.020, 73.0% within 5 disposals. Council pipeline with three gates. Weekly automated publish cycle.
svg.text: 130 years of AFL data · 13,329 players · AI-powered predictions

g.text: Three gold gates — DataSentinel ×2 and Skeptic — can halt the ship. No verdict, no publish.
Machine learning ensemble: LightGBM + HGB + Random Forest
Seven-agent AI council for verified sports journalism
Automated weekly from a single shell script — data refresh, model retrain, backtest, council review, and publish in one run.
Features: recent form · season averages · venue & opponent · career profile · strict temporal cutoffs enforced
